warnings: No cross-source contradiction found. The single document (DOC_001) carries three insurers' denial notices (삼성화재 p1-2, KB p3, 한화 p4) for the same 뇌혈관질환진단비 (I67.8) claim; all three agree on every shared fact checked (diagnosis code/name, imaging date, imaging findings, presenting complaint, claim item, denial disposition). Conflict ledger left clear.

CHK-1: DOC_001 p3 renders the KCD code as 'I67B', a known OCR/transcription variant of I67.8 already adjudicated upstream (see ocr_result_DOC_001.json resolution and claim-analysis warnings). Logged here as consistent, NOT raised as a fresh P6 conflict, per that upstream resolution.

Not raised as P6 conflicts by design: (a) the insurer-vs-claimant disagreement over whether the I67.8 진단확정 is objectively established is denial-validation's (Phase 2) subject matter, not an internal source-vs-source contradiction; (b) the distinct event dates in the case (first visit 2025-09-30, imaging 2025-10-10, imaging read 2025-10-14, diagnosis/발급 2025-10-16, claim receipt 2025-10-20, KB contract 2023-10-16) are different event types, not conflicting values for the same fact.

CHK-8: 삼성 p1's explicit 사고일 field is blank/unpopulated ('사고일: ;'), so it states no competing value against 한화 p4's 진단 발급일 2025-10-16 — no contradiction, only a single-sourced value. claim-analysis already flagged (review_required=true) that accident_date=2025-10-16 is a best-available 진단서-발급일 mapping rather than a stated 사고일; that flag is preserved for adjuster review and is not itself a cross-source conflict.
